Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Procees
Off Calendar Jun-19-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS POWER HORSE USA, INC. and S. SPITZ, K.G.'S Motion To Quash Service Of Process ON DEFENDANT S. SPITZ K.G. is granted. Plaintiff has presented no admissable evidence that service on Konigsbauer effected service on Spitz. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB/JF)
